status: CRUD skeletons only; NOT upgraded to usable flows this sprint

honest: These three areas remain thin CRUD skeletons (entity + create/list/edit/deactivate + a REST endpoint). No payroll engine, no POS sale flow, no cart/checkout were implemented this sprint. They are the principal reason ERPNext parity is 45% rather than the 55% stretch target.
